Claude Code
read through whole codebas…
Edit
videoFrameExtractor.ts
Now fix the two duration probing commands too:
Edit
videoFrameExtractor.ts
Modified
Edit
videoFrameExtractor.ts
Modified
The problem was that ffmpeg 4.4 was misdetecting the merged WebM file as m4v (MPEG-4 Video). Three fixes applied:
1. -f matroska — forces the Matroska/WebM demuxer instead of letting ffmpeg auto-detect (and get it wrong)
2. -analyzeduration 10000000 — gives ffmpeg 10 seconds to analyze the stream (up from 0)
3. -probesize 10000000 — increases probe buffer to 10MB so it can read enough of the VP9 stream to identify codec parameters
Applied to all three ffmpeg invocations (frame extraction + both duration probes).
Esc to focus or unfocus Claude
Edit autom…
